---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new audit dimension, scoring tweak, or workflow improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem

<!-- What's missing or awkward today? Why does it matter? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you fix it? Be specific. If it's a new dimension, sketch the metric and threshold. -->

## Phase

<!-- Which phase does this belong to? Phase 1 (CSV MVP), 2 (API), 3 (peers), 4 (batch+admin), 5 (productize)? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why didn't they work? -->

## Out-of-scope?

If this falls outside the current phase, say so — we may merge a phase-N+1 branch but won't ship until that phase opens.
